summary: Iteration 11 testing completed - All requested features verified. 20/20 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI features verified: AI Command Center with voice/upload buttons, Visual Workflow Builder with node palette and canvas.
critical_code_review_comments: Voice transcription endpoint properly returns error for invalid base64 audio data
PDF upload and parsing works with PyPDF2 library
AI stats endpoint returns comprehensive usage statistics
Visual Workflow Builder has proper node palette with all step types
seed_data_creation: Test workflows and documents created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 11 request verified: Voice transcription returns proper error for empty/invalid audio, PDF upload works with base64 encoding, Text document upload with AI extraction works, AI Command Center loads with welcome message and suggested actions, Visual Workflow Builder at /visual-workflow route has node palette and canvas, Voice recording button visible and clickable, AI stats endpoint returns user statistics.

backend_voice_transcribe_invalid_audio.details: Returns error response for invalid base64 audio

backend_pdf_upload.details: Accepts base64 encoded PDFs, parses with PyPDF2

backend_text_upload.details: Uploads text documents with AI extraction of key facts, entities, insights

backend_ai_stats.details: Returns sessions, totalPlans, completedPlans, knowledgeDocuments, agentLearnings, successRate

frontend_ai_command_center.details: Loads with welcome message, suggested actions, voice button, upload button, stats display

frontend_visual_workflow_builder.details: Node palette with all step types (Trigger, Email, Wait, Approval, Branch, Action, End), canvas area, AI Generate button, Save/Test Run buttons

frontend_voice_button.details: Mic icon button visible and clickable, toggles recording state

frontend_upload_button.details: Opens file upload dialog with drag-drop support, accepts .txt, .md, .json, .csv

mocked_apis.voice_transcription: Voice transcription uses OpenAI Whisper via emergentintegrations - returns error for invalid audio data
mocked_apis.sendgrid: SendGrid email sending is MOCKED - placeholder API key in backend/.env
mocked_apis.data_sources: Apollo.io, Clearbit, Crunchbase integrations are UI placeholders only

test_execution_details.playwright_tests: All UI elements verified - AI Command Center, Visual Workflow Builder, voice/upload buttons
